scripts.studio: npm run assets && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.render: npm run assets && remotion render src/index.ts CriteriaForgeRich ../../output/criteriaforge-demo/criteriaforge-remotion.mp4 --codec=h264 --pixel-format=yuv420p --crf=18 --audio-bitrate=192k --concurrency=50%
scripts.render:still: npm run assets && remotion still src/index.ts CriteriaForgeRich ../../output/criteriaforge-demo/criteriaforge-remotion-poster.png --frame=84
scripts.check: npm run assets && tsc --noEmit && remotion compositions src/index.ts
